name: pedagogy-of-the-oppressed
description: Paulo Freire's foundational work of critical pedagogy — recognizing the banking model of education, developing critical consciousness, practicing liberatory dialogue, and transforming oppression through praxis.
useCase: Identifying oppressive systems, learning dialogical teaching, developing critical consciousness, moving from reflection to transformative action.
knownRisks: Freire's work is grounded in Marxist analysis — some readers may reject this framework
The language is dense and philosophical — beginners may struggle
Some critics argue Freire overemphasizes class at the expense of race and gender (though later work addresses this)
